pipeline.name: trading-bot-modernization
pipeline.objective: Deliver a stable, observable, risk-aware trading bot through five execution phases that Codex can validate, track, and advance.

phase_gates: Core Engine must be stable before strategy work expands
Money Control is release-blocking for live trading
Dashboard controls must use the same risk and execution APIs as automated flows

agents.name: supervisor-agent
agents.role: Owns sequencing, gate checks, and release decisions.

agents.name: risk-agent
agents.role: Enforces portfolio, loss, exposure, and kill-switch controls.

agents.name: execution-agent
agents.role: Places, retries, fails over, and reconciles exchange orders.

phases.name: Core Engine
phases.goal: Stabilize the trading system architecture before intelligence and UI work.
phases.gate: No later phase ships without restartability, configuration controls, and structured telemetry.

tasks.title: Refactor trading bot into modular services
acceptance_criteria: service boundaries are explicit
cross-service contracts are typed or schema defined
integration smoke tests pass

tasks.title: Implement centralized config system
acceptance_criteria: runtime config reload does not require a restart
invalid config changes are rejected safely
default and production examples are documented

tasks.title: Add structured logging
acceptance_criteria: every order lifecycle event includes a trade ID
latency is emitted in milliseconds
realized PnL is emitted when applicable

tasks.title: Build retry and failover execution wrapper
acceptance_criteria: transient API failures are retried with backoff
duplicate order placement is prevented
failover outcomes are logged and alertable

tasks.title: Create watchdog process
acceptance_criteria: watchdog restarts the bot after configured inactivity
restart reason is persisted
cooldown avoids restart loops

tasks.title: Implement environment validation script
acceptance_criteria: script exits non-zero on blocking issues
checks can run in CI or preflight mode
sensitive values are never printed raw

phases.name: Strategy Intelligence
phases.goal: Add interpretable signal generation and sizing after the engine is stable.
phases.gate: Only enabled after the core engine is ready and replay testing exists.

tasks.title: Implement Split Stack strategy engine
acceptance_criteria: signals are individually toggleable
entry and exit logic can be replayed independently

tasks.title: Add multi-timeframe analysis
acceptance_criteria: alignment output is reusable by scoring and risk layers
missing timeframe data degrades gracefully

tasks.title: Create sentiment ingestion module
acceptance_criteria: external source failures are isolated
scores are timestamped and source tagged

tasks.title: Build signal scoring system
acceptance_criteria: weights are configurable
confidence explains contributing factors

tasks.title: Add dynamic position sizing
acceptance_criteria: position size shrinks under higher volatility
risk caps still apply after sizing

tasks.title: Create backtesting engine
acceptance_criteria: backtests replay strategy and execution assumptions
reports capture win rate, drawdown, and expectancy

phases.name: AI and Learning Layer
phases.goal: Introduce model-based filtering after deterministic strategy and data layers exist.
phases.gate: Models cannot influence production trades until rollback, anomaly controls, and backtests are live.

tasks.title: Implement reinforcement learning loop
acceptance_criteria: profit contributes positive reward
drawdown contributes explicit penalty
offline training stays separate from live execution

tasks.title: Build feature store for training data
acceptance_criteria: features are reproducible by timestamp
outcomes are linked to executed trades

tasks.title: Train model for trade filtering
acceptance_criteria: decision threshold is configurable
baseline heuristic comparison is documented

tasks.title: Add anomaly detection
acceptance_criteria: weird market conditions generate explicit flags
risk and execution can consume anomaly status

tasks.title: Create model versioning system
acceptance_criteria: current production model is identifiable
rollback can restore a prior approved model

tasks.title: Auto-tune strategy parameters
acceptance_criteria: optimization stays inside risk guardrails
candidate parameters require backtest evidence

phases.name: Money Control
phases.goal: Protect capital with hard risk gates and shutdown logic.
phases.gate: This phase is mandatory before any live trading release.

tasks.title: Build global risk manager
acceptance_criteria: global risk checks execute before every order
breaches are logged and block new exposure

tasks.title: Implement kill-switch
acceptance_criteria: kill-switch prevents new orders immediately
activation reason is recorded for audit

tasks.title: Add per-pair exposure limits
acceptance_criteria: new trades are rejected when pair exposure exceeds threshold
limits are configurable by pair

tasks.title: Create slippage protection system
acceptance_criteria: orders are canceled or amended when slippage exceeds threshold
slippage events are measurable

tasks.title: Implement profit locking system
acceptance_criteria: secured gains persist across restarts
profit lock interacts cleanly with execution retries

phases.name: Dashboard and Control
phases.goal: Expose safe operator visibility and manual control on top of the stable platform.
phases.gate: Manual actions must route through the same risk and execution controls as automated actions.

tasks.title: Build real-time dashboard
acceptance_criteria: dashboard refreshes from structured event streams
no sensitive secrets are rendered in the UI

tasks.title: Add manual override panel
acceptance_criteria: every manual action is audited
override actions still pass through risk policies

tasks.title: Create trade visualization charts
acceptance_criteria: visualizations link trades to signals
time axes support multi-timeframe context

tasks.title: Add alert system
acceptance_criteria: critical alerts are deduplicated
kill-switch and watchdog events notify operators

automation.bonus_goal: Turn the roadmap into a Codex task pipeline that can be validated, tracked, and advanced from the command line.

future_extension.name: agent-system
future_extension.description: A future extension can add queue-backed multi-agent orchestration once the first five phases are underway.
